name: accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, inconsistent invoice formats cause delayed payments. We aggregate and format supplier invoices into standardized reports instead of manual data entry and formatting.
problem_solved: Inconsistent invoice formats lead to delayed payments.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inconsistent invoice formats lead to delayed payments.
